step.name: declare-interfaces-at-service
step.action: Service declares interfaces for repo + external clients. Repo exports concrete class implementing those interfaces.

step.name: implement-repository
step.action: Repo with ORM/SQL. Each method takes/returns domain types. Add integration tests with testcontainers / docker-compose.

step.name: implement-service
step.action: Service methods orchestrate repo + external + business logic. Tests use mocked repo with vitest/jest.

step.name: wire-controller
step.action: Controller decodes via zod/yup, calls service, encodes. Tests use supertest with mocked service.
step.decision-gate: If controller exceeds ~50 lines of non-decode/encode, push work down to service.
